structuredContent.source:
pub fn send(
        &mut self,
        cfg: &AgentLoopConfig,
        transport: &dyn LoopTransport,
        registry: &ToolRegistry,
        tool_ctx: &ToolContext,
        sink: &dyn AuditSink,
        user_prompt: &str,
    ) -> Result<LoopOutcome, AgentLoopError> {
        AgentLoop::run(self, cfg, transport, registry, tool_ctx, sink, user_prompt)
    }
